subject: revert(pwa): remove Brave install fallback changes
body:
Reverts both the timeout-based and direct Brave detection approaches
added in the previous two commits. The beforeinstallprompt handling
is restored to its original state.

Tags: pwa, brave, revert
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch
